# Copilot Instructions — Angular NX Monorepo

This is an NX 23 monorepo using Angular 21 and pnpm. All code generated by Copilot must follow
these conventions. More detailed, file-type-specific rules live in `.github/instructions/`.

## Non-Negotiable Rules

- **Quotes:** Always use single quotes `'` for strings in TypeScript and JavaScript.
  Double quotes are only acceptable inside string literals that contain a single quote.
- **No `any`:** Never use TypeScript `any`. Use `unknown` for uncertain types, then narrow with type guards.
- **No `!important`:** Never use `!important` in CSS or SCSS. Fix specificity instead.
- **No hardcoded CSS values:** Never hardcode colors, spacing, or font sizes as raw values.
  Use CSS custom properties (`--color-primary`) or SCSS variables (`$spacing-md`).
- **Standalone Angular components only:** Never create NgModules. Use standalone components,
  directives, and pipes exclusively (`standalone: true`).
- **OnPush by default:** Every Angular component must include
  `changeDetection: ChangeDetectionStrategy.OnPush`.
- **BEM for CSS class names:** Use the Block__Element--Modifier pattern for all SCSS class names.
- **DRY:** Never duplicate logic. Extract reusable code into services, utilities, or shared packages under `packages/`.
- **No magic numbers or strings:** Never use unexplained numeric or string literals. Name them as constants.
- **inject() over constructor injection:** Use the `inject()` function for Angular DI, not constructor params.
- **Signals first:** Prefer Angular Signals over RxJS for local component state.
- **New control flow syntax:** Use `@if`, `@for`, `@switch` — never `*ngIf`, `*ngFor`, `*ngSwitch`.

## Project Structure

```
apps/shop       — Angular 21 frontend (standalone, OnPush, Vite, SCSS)
apps/api        — Node/Express backend API
packages/shop/  — Shared Angular libraries
packages/api/   — Shared API packages
packages/shared — Cross-cutting models and utilities
```

Path aliases: `@org/shop/data`, `@org/models`, `@org/api/products`, etc. (see `tsconfig.base.json`).

## Detailed Rules by File Type

| File type        | Instructions file                                 |
| ---------------- | ------------------------------------------------- |
| All TypeScript   | `.github/instructions/typescript.instructions.md` |
| Angular `.ts`    | `.github/instructions/angular.instructions.md`    |
| `.scss` / `.css` | `.github/instructions/scss.instructions.md`       |
| All files        | `.github/instructions/general.instructions.md`    |
